name: Almond Cookie Bars
recipeInstructions: In a medium bowl, combine oats, 3/4 cup brown sugar, butter, flour, egg, milk and almond extract. Stir in chocolate chips and pecans. Spread batter evenly in a greased 8 inch square microwave safe baking dish. For topping, combine remaining 3/4 cup brown sugar and remaining 1/2 cup pecans in a small bowl; sprinkle over batter. Microwave on high power for 3 minutes; rotate dish. Cook 3 to 5 minutes longer or until sugar topping is melted. Cool completely.
